description: Common Paper Standard AI Addendum — addendum to existing commercial agreements covering AI-specific provisions such as data use, model training, and acceptable use policies.
Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement — HIPAA-compliant agreement governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) between covered entities and business associates.
Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement — comprehensive agreement for the provision of cloud-hosted software services, covering subscription terms, support, security, and data handling.
Common Paper Data Processing Agreement — GDPR-aligned agreement governing the processing of personal data by a service provider on behalf of a data controller.
Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement — bilateral confidentiality agreement for two parties sharing sensitive or proprietary information with each other.
Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA — a short-form cover sheet capturing the key deal variables (parties, purpose, term) that attach to the Mutual-NDA.md standard terms.
Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement — agreement governing reseller, referral, and channel partner relationships, including appointment, obligations, compensation, and IP ownership.
Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement — time-limited agreement for product pilots and proof-of-concept trials, covering access rights, feedback obligations, and conversion to a full subscription.
Common Paper standard Software License Agreement — enterprise on-premise software license covering grant of rights, restrictions, maintenance, support, and warranty terms.
Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement — agreement for early-stage product design partnerships, covering access to pre-release software, feedback obligations, and confidentiality.

Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement — agreement for the delivery of professional and consulting services, including statements of work, deliverables, IP ownership, and payment terms.
Common Paper Service Level Agreement — defines uptime commitments, measurement methodology, and service credits for cloud software services; intended to be incorporated into a CSA or equivalent.
